shellvoy.title: Condition Of vessel
shellvoy.text_starts_with: Owners shall exercise due diligence to ensure that
shellvoy.text_ends_with: accept 29 February 2000 as a valid date.

essar.title: INTERNATIONAL REGULATIONS CLAUSE
essar.text_starts_with: Vessel to comply with all national and international regulations

struck_must_be_absent: or if such loss or damage was caused by an act of war
and any taxes on freight whatsoever
5% more or less in Owners' option
Has cargo pumps capable of discharging a full cargo
use due diligence to keep the tanks, lines and pumps of the vessel clean
kept_must_be_present: keep the tanks, lines and pumps of the vessel always clean for the cargo
recognize the year 2000 as a leap year
NO FREIGHT FAX ON OWNERS ACCOUNT
Vessel to comply with all national and international regulations
